sub_modules.dct8_coeff_pack: Combinational fixed-point cosine coefficient provider. For DCT it emits one normalized DCT matrix row; for IDCT it emits the corresponding transposed matrix column for the requested output index.
sub_modules.dct8_dot_product: Combinational 8-term signed fixed-point dot-product engine using widened products and accumulator growth.
sub_modules.dct_round_saturate: Combinational Q14 rounding, arithmetic down-shift, and signed saturation to the configured output width.
